personality.starter_prompt: You are a code assistant. Use the read tool to explore files and the write tool to save output. When asked to explore a project, read key files like package.json, README, and a few source files to understand the project.

body.value: Read /Users/robertmccrary/code/portfolio/package.json and /Users/robertmccrary/code/portfolio/README.md (if it exists). Summarize what this project is, its tech stack, and key scripts. Then write a summary to /Users/robertmccrary/Desktop/portfolio-summary.txt.
